title: Governance packet
description: Common shape for every governance packet produced at milestone or release boundaries. Every packet carries explicit owner and backup-owner fields and resolves waivers through ownership_matrix.yaml. Packet families: verification, benchmark_report, compatibility_report, claim_manifest, shiproom, waiver_register.

owner.description: Primary DRI for this packet. Required on every packet; no silent blanks.

backup_owner.description: Backup owner. Required unless backup_waiver is cited.

backup_waiver.description: Waiver id from ownership_matrix.waivers, required when backup_owner is null.

evidence_owner.description: Named evidence owner. Distinct from owner so a packet can be authored by one party and attested by another.

covered_lanes.description: Lane ids this packet speaks for. Each entry MUST resolve to an id in ownership_matrix.scorecard_lane_index.

kind.description: Evidence category, e.g. benchmark_result, sbom, provenance, compatibility_run, ux_review.

ref.description: Repo-relative path or stable URI to the evidence artifact.

waiver_refs.description: Active waivers influencing this packet. IDs resolve against ownership_matrix.waivers.

decisions.description: Decisions recorded through this packet's lifecycle.

allOf.description: Every packet must name a backup owner or cite an active waiver. No silent blanks.
